campaign.name: The Gethsemane Sector Crusade
campaign.subtitle: A static, JSON-driven campaign tracker for Warhammer 40,000 Crusade rules.

map.notes: Replace with your sector art when ready.

planets.name: Vortannis Prime
planets.description: A crowded hive world anchoring the sector's industrial output.
planets.lore: The hive spires burn with a thousand forge fires each night.

planets.name: Damnatio
planets.description: A jungle world where the canopy swallows entire armies.
planets.lore: No map drawn here survives a single campaign season.

history.event: A contested landing zone was established.

planets.name: Heliarch
planets.description: Ancient manufactoria and orbital docks dominate this world.
planets.lore: Its machine-spirits are said to remember the first crusade fleets.

planets.name: Morrow's Gate
planets.description: A fertile supply world feeding nearby garrisons.
planets.lore: Fields of grain stretch as far as the eye can see between shrine towers.

battleReports.summary: The jungle advance was halted at the river line.
